description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-05-11T06:33:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 11 May 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
2026-05-11T06:33:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年5⽉11⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

2026-05-13T15:40:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to vessel mechanical defects, the following ferry services are suspended. 
Coral Sea Ferry Service Company Limited
- From Sai Wan Ho: suspended at 3:33 pm
- From Kwun Tong: suspended at 3:48 pm
.
2026-05-13T15:40:00.CONTENT_CN:
因船隻機件故障，以下渡輪服務暫停服務。
珊瑚海船務有限公司
-西灣河開出:下午3時33分暫停服務
-觀塘開出:下午3時48分暫停服務
。

2026-05-13T16:17:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to vessel mechanical defects, the following ferry service will be or have been suspended. 
Coral Sea Ferry Service Company Limited
- From Sai Wan Ho: suspended from 3:33 pm
- From Kwun Tong: suspended from 3:48 pm.
2026-05-13T16:17:00.CONTENT_CN:
因船隻機件故障，以下渡輪服務將會或已經暫停服務。
珊瑚海船務有限公司
-西灣河開出:下午3時33分起暫停服務
-觀塘開出:下午3時48分起暫停服務。

2026-05-13T16:55:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services which was suspended due to vessel mechanical defects will be resumed:
Coral Sea Ferry Service Company Limited
-Sai Wan Ho to Kwun Tong : resumed from 5:33 pm
-Kwun Tong to Sai Wan Ho : resumed from 5:03 pm.
2026-05-13T16:55:00.CONTENT_CN:
較早前因受船隻機件故障而停航的以下渡輪服務將恢復服務:
珊瑚海船務有限公司
-西灣河至觀塘:下午5時33分起恢復服務
-觀塘至西灣河:下午5時03分起恢復服務。

2026-05-14T08:12:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following road section is busy:
– Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Kowloon bound)
Motorists passing through the above road section are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2026-05-14T08:12:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通繁忙:
–大埔公路　–　沙田段(往九龍方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。
